description: Read-impact proposal with untrusted provenance passes the verifier. Read impact does not trigger the trust/evidence causal rejection used for higher-impact proposals, so this proposal is accepted even though provenance.trust is 'untrusted'.
source: adapted from examples/read_only_query.json; exercises the causal rule that read-impact proposals are not rejected solely for untrusted provenance

proposal.intent: Search internal documentation for company holiday policy.

claims.text: User is asking for public HR policy
